verdict_reasoning: HSPA5/GRP78/BiP is canonically an ER-luminal HSP70 chaperone, but has extensive documented cell-surface display on tumor cells and stressed cells (cs-GRP78), driven by ER stress and oncogenic transformation. This surface pool is a validated therapeutic target with multiple antibody, ADC, and CAR-T programs in development against cs-GRP78. Ruling out other buckets: not lysosomal TM; the surface pool is cancer/stress-induced rather than a constitutive minority cycling pool; not narrow germline/developmental display; no covalent TM-partner tethering established. Best fit is cell_state_induced via ER stress and oncogenic transformation.
